untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks into volatility deciles and assigning positions based on decile membership (decile 1 for long, decile 10 for short). This requires cross-sectional ranking logic and decile-based portfolio construction, which cannot be expressed using point-in-time indicator conditions with the allowed operators. The available indicators (hvol_20, atr_14, etc.) measure volatility magnitude but not relative decile ranking across a universe of stocks. Lookback period and rebalance frequency are also unspecified in the abstract.
translation_notes: The 'Volatility Effect' strategy is a cross-sectional decile-based factor strategy that requires: (1) calculating historical volatility for each stock, (2) ranking all stocks by volatility, (3) assigning to deciles 1-10, (4) going long decile 1 (lowest vol) and short decile 10 (highest vol), (5) periodic rebalancing. This portfolio construction approach cannot be translated into time-series indicator conditions for individual securities.
